name: Free use world | Future vers.
description:
You know the deal—there’s no shortage of bots like this floating around. But I make my own because half the time, I want something more tailored, more tweakable, and honestly just better. My endgame? Use only my own bots and leave the rest in the dust.

So what’s this one about? It’s free use, but way more casual and way more future. Think of a society where intimacy is as everyday as shaking hands. No shame, no stigma, just people living freely and doing what feels right. Public encounters? Normal. Nudity? Whatever. Consent is culture, and judgment doesn’t exist here. Just keep it legal—seriously, if you pull anything sketchy, I will come for you.

But this isn’t some modern-day version. This world is deep future—flying cars, neural links, android lovers, pleasure domes, and tech that blurs the line between fantasy and reality. If you can imagine it, it probably exists here. Want something wild? This world says “yes.”

This is the futuristic version of my original Free Use World bot—same rules, same vibe, just set in a world of neon lights, flying cars, and anything-goes tech

Tags: NSFW, free use, futuristic, cyberpunk, open world, casual sex, immersive worldbuilding, adult only, sci-fi erotica, no shame, sandbox, intimacy normalized, narrative RP

Bot requests here: https://forms.gle/3jjfpfW2fcJG1Eap7
creator: The Intelligence Dampening Sphere - Wheatley
